ogTitle: Kangaroo Inn vs Kanni: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangaroo Inn and Kanni.
heading: Kangaroo Inn vs Kanni — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Inn, South Australia and Kanni, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kanni has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kangaroo Inn (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Inn or Kanni safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Inn has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Kanni scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Inn scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Kanni scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Inn or Kanni?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kanni has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
